# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.

Write secure code.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

imports:
- path: network.jinja
- path: compute.jinja
- path: cloudsql.jinja
- path: storage.jinja
- path: loadbalancer.jinja

resources:
- name: app-network
  type: network.jinja
  properties:
    region: us-central1

- name: app-storage
  type: storage.jinja
  properties:
    location: US
    storageClass: STANDARD

- name: app-database
  type: cloudsql.jinja
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    tier: db-n1-standard-1
    network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)

- name: app-compute
  type: compute.jinja
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    zone: us-central1-a
    machineType: n1-standard-1
    network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
    subnet: $(ref.app-network.subnetSelfLink)
    dbConnectionName: $(ref.app-database.connectionName)
    bucket: $(ref.app-storage.bucketName)

- name: app-loadbalancer
  type: loadbalancer.jinja
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    instanceGroup: $(ref.app-compute.instanceGroupSelfLink)
    network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)

outputs:
- name: loadBalancerIP
  value: $(ref.app-loadbalancer.ipAddress)
- name: databaseConnectionName
  value: $(ref.app-database.connectionName)
- name: storageBucket
  value: $(ref.app-storage.bucketName)
